title: Notabschaltung Laser überschreitet 200 ms Grenze
description: Emergency stop button takes 250 ms to stop laser pulse. IEC 62304 SW-Class C requirement REQ-SAFETY-03 specifies maximum 200 ms. Reproducible 5/5 times.
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Start treatment on phantom eye. 2. Press emergency stop. 3. Measure time until laserStopped event in log.

title: Patient-ID-Validierung akzeptiert Sonderzeichen
description: Patient-ID input field accepts characters like '@' and '#' which violates the documented ID format (alphanumeric + hyphen).
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open New Patient dialog. 2. Enter '@@@-2026' as Patient-ID. 3. Save.
actual: Patient is saved with invalid ID.

title: Tooltip auf Energie-Slider nicht lokalisiert (DE)
description: Tooltip on the energy slider in the calibration view is shown in English even when system language is set to German.
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Switch UI language to German. 2. Hover over energy slider.

title: OCT-Vorschau friert nach 5 Min ein
description: OCT preview stream freezes after roughly 5 minutes of continuous use. UI thread remains responsive but image stops updating.
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Start OCT preview. 2. Leave it open for >5 minutes.

title: Memory Leak in Treatment Logger
description: Treatment Logger keeps allocating memory and never frees old log entries. Caused service module to crash after ~12 h.
